skills.name: Phantom Blade Dance
skills.description: Leaps into the air to fire a slashing wave, then cleaves all enemies. Grants all Star Attribute allies 3 stacks of Leap if self has Clean Wind (Undispellable). If self doesn't have Clean Wind, grants self ATK Up for 3 turns and Bright Moon (Undispellable). Extra turn if Phantom Blade Dance makes Clear Wind Bright Moon available.

levels.description: Leaps into the air to fire a slashing wave, then cleaves all enemies. Grants all Star Attribute allies 3 stacks of Leap if self has Clean Wind (Undispellable). If self doesn't have Clean Wind, grants self ATK Up for 3 turns and Bright Moon (Undispellable). Extra turn if Phantom Blade Dance makes Clear Wind Bright Moon available.

seEffects.buffDesc: Grants an extra turn.
ATK increases by 1% per stack. Granted to Star Attribute allies.
Increases ATK by 30%.
Reduces Special skill cooldown by 1.
Increases ATK by 20%. (Undispellable)
Changes Clear Wind Bright Moon to single-target variant.

skills.name: Clear Wind Bright Moon
skills.description: Unleashes the ultimate form of the Wind Moon Sect's sword art to attack all enemies. If self has Bright Moon (Undispellable), attacks a single target, Crit DMG +50% on hit and Toughness DMG +1. If self doesn't have Bright Moon, grants all Star Attribute allies Crit DMG Up for 2 turns and grants self Clean Wind (Undispellable) for 3 turns. Extra turn if Clear Wind Bright Moon makes Phantom Blade Dance available.

levels.description: Unleashes the ultimate form of the Wind Moon Sect's sword art to attack all enemies. If self has Bright Moon (Undispellable), attacks a single target, Crit DMG +50% on hit and Toughness DMG +1. If self doesn't have Bright Moon, grants all Star Attribute allies Crit DMG Up for 2 turns and grants self Clean Wind (Undispellable) for 3 turns. Extra turn if Clear Wind Bright Moon makes Phantom Blade Dance available.

skills.name: Blade Dancer
skills.description: Increases Lyn's ATK by 2% for each stack of Leap, up to 5 stacks, on attack. If self has Clean Wind after using Phantom Blade Dance, reduces its CD by 1. If self has Bright Moon after using Clear Wind Bright Moon, reduces its CD by 1.

levels.description: Increases Lyn's ATK by 2% for each stack of Leap, up to 5 stacks, on attack. If self has Clean Wind after using Phantom Blade Dance, reduces its CD by 1. If self has Bright Moon after using Clear Wind Bright Moon, reduces its CD by 1.

seEffects.buffDesc: Reverts Clear Wind Bright Moon to AOE variant at turn start.
Increases ATK by 2% per Leap stack.
